name: Gaia Plate the Earth Giant
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>球</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ガイア・プレート
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, banish 1 Rock monster from your GY or send this card to the GY. You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 2 Rock monsters from your GY. If this card battles an opponent's monster, that monster's ATK/DEF become halved during damage calculation only.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase, banish 1 Rock monster from your GY or send this card to the GY. You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by banishing 2 Rock monsters from your GY. If this card battles an opponent's monster, that monster's ATK/DEF become halved during damage calculation only.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
